notes: v355 — AUTO-PILOT PRICE BAND: only buy shares between two prices. The 🤖 auto-pilot rules (📋 My trading rules) now have a Min $ and Max $ field: set them and the bot only ever buys shares whose price sits inside that band — e.g. only shares between $0.10 and $2.00. Leave either one blank for no limit on that side. It uses the share's last end-of-day close, and it's auto-pilot only — your own manual buys aren't affected. Handy for keeping the practice bot to the price range you actually want to trade. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v355. ALSO RECENT — v354 — hide/show your P&L in the portfolio (👁). v353 — brokerage fees verified ($10 buy / $10 sell). v352 — your shares only sell when you say so; trailing stop is opt-in. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
